title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Eurt Tether Limited
body: " Application number 5371  Applicant Tether Operations, s.a. de c.v objected to the name used by Eurt Tether Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Eurt Tether Limited is changed to 16105014, Ltd. "
